claims_reviewed.claim: A detainee named Juan was released April 24, 2026 from North Lake.
claims_reviewed.notes: First-person attributed testimonial from Juan himself ('So this is from Juan. I was released Friday April 24.'). Not independently corroborated in press, but consistent with broader Baldwin/North Lake release pattern; press attribution rule applies.

claims_reviewed.claim: Juan was held 90 days at North Lake before release.
claims_reviewed.notes: Chip claim; not independently verified for this individual. North Lake had average daily population of 1,300+ with documented long stays, so plausible. Speaker testimony is the source.

claims_reviewed.claim: Federal judges have issued very high bond awards and denials of bond in asylum cases.
claims_reviewed.notes: Confirmed: bond hearings have been 'almost pre-ordained to be denied'; Matter of Yajure Hurtado (Sept 2025) BIA decision restricted bond eligibility; 100+ MI immigrants granted habeas were still denied bond.

claims_reviewed.claim: ICE is not following the law in detention conditions/practices.
claims_reviewed.notes: 4,421+ federal court rulings of unlawful detention since October 2025; multiple courts including in MI have ruled North Lake detentions unconstitutional.

summary: 4 claims reviewed: 2 supported, 2 uncertain (first-person speaker testimonials about specific individual). Reel cleared for render.
